title: MeiQi 2020
description:
MeiQi Series IntroductionMeiQi is a plot-oriented puzzle game set in the 1990s in China, where players will take on the role of the police detective "Liu Youth" as the core force of justice, solving cases and defeating various evil organizations. The game consists of a number of independent cases, which together create a very rich story. By the end of summer 2022, there have been nine consecutive seasons, each season consists of six separate games (DLC). Each episode has an approximate play time of one hour.

The original game was developed using the Unity engine and debuted on the AppStore, and this collection will be based on the original game using the Unreal5 engine. You will get a better visual experience as well as control experience on the PC platform.Sun Miki Suspicion 2020
Sun Miki Suspense 2020 is a collection of the 2020 releases of the Sun Miki Suspense series
It contains the complete second/third/fourth/fifth seasons, as well as a special episode.
Specifically includes
Season 2
S02E01:ZhuXiaoKun
S02E02:ZhouJing
S02E03:ZhangHongjun
S02E04:Suidatong
S02E05:Xiaxiaomei
S02E06:LiuQingchun
Season 3

S03E02:JinFenghuang

S03E04:SongMingChao

S03E06:LangWei
Season 4

Special Episode
CaptivityGame Features
• Rich scenery and 1990s local nostalgic style

Each individual case takes place in a unique location, with carefully designed scenery and objects. 90's China is familiar and unfamiliar, and you'll feel especially close to it. As the cases continue, you will be treated to a complete look at China in the 80's and 90's. They will include: homes and lodges, temples and ancient buildings, public spaces, transportation, and any location you have ever thought of.

• Separate but continuous episodes and continuous updates

Each case is a stand-alone game that can be played in any order, and you can enter the Sunmatch universe from any case (DLC), and the exciting plot will be continuously updated, and you can get the latest information (trailers and new clues) through Steam or other media!

• The core gameplay of scene exploration, puzzle solving, and deduction correlation

Carefully designed scenes with a series of objects furnished, organs, puzzles, you can search for evidence in the process to understand the plot, reasoning and correlation is the core gameplay of the Sun Miki suspect case, as a detective, you must master the skills of reasoning!About meYes, all the development work is done by me independently, please tolerate some flaws, if possible Sun Miki detective universe will always be updated.
description_short: The MeiQi Series is an episodic mystery game. This collection contains all of Season2/3/4 and 5,which will be released in 2020,and a special episode. In total there are 25 chapters.
